title: 17. FinOps & cost estimation — LLM budget + infra costing
description: DailyCostBudget circuit breaker; estimate infra/service cost; unit economics.
story:
FinOps is the practice of bringing financial accountability to cloud/variable spend.

In THIS app (LLM path):
• finops/budget.py DailyCostBudget with llm_cost_budget_usd_per_day (default $5)
• Gateway records spend; BudgetExceeded trips circuit when ceiling hit
• Redis shares budget across replicas when configured

Infra costing (general method):
1) Inventory services (API pods, Neo4j, Redis, load balancer, egress, observability).
2) Price each with cloud calculator or committed rates.
3) Add LLM tokens: cost ≈ (input_tokens·p_in + output_tokens·p_out) / 1e6.
4) Unit cost = monthly_spend / successful_diagnoses.
5) Alerts on budget burn rate — not only absolute ceiling.
one_liner: Budget breaker for LLM $; inventory+price for infra; track cost per diagnosis.
why_it_matters: Graphs and observability clusters are not free.
say_aloud: DailyCostBudget is a circuit breaker on LLM spend.
Default demo ceiling is five dollars per day.
I estimate infra from inventory times unit prices.
Token cost is priced per million tokens in and out.

cheat_sheet.meaning: Data transfer out — often surprising cost

beats.title: Budget breaker idea
beats.say_after: Allow before call; record after; trip when over.

line_quiz.prompt: What happens when spent exceeds ceiling?

fill_blanks.template:
cost = (in_tok * p_in + out_tok * p_out) / {{d}}
if not budget.allow(cost): raise BudgetExceeded

beats.title: Infra estimate worksheet (text)
beats.goal: List cost lines for this architecture.
beats.code:
Monthly rough model (worksheet — fill with real prices):
API compute     = replicas * vCPU_price * hours
Neo4j           = managed graph tier OR VMs + disk + backup
Redis           = managed cache tier
Load balancer   = fixed + LCU/egress
Observability   = metrics samples + log GB + trace spans
LLM (if on)     = tokens * $/1M + image gen units
Data transfer   = egress GB * rate
----------------
Total / diagnoses_per_month = $ per diagnosis

Tools: cloud pricing calculator, Infracost on terraform plan,
provider token price pages, Prometheus cost metrics if exported.
beats.say_after: Inventory, price, divide by business volume.

concepts.definition: Cloud financial operations — visibility, optimization, accountability.
concepts.say_aloud: Engineers and finance share ownership of spend.

common_mistakes: Forgetting egress and observability in estimates.
final_boss: Estimate $ per diagnosis with 3 infra lines + tokens (symbolic).
